title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Natco Pharma

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Natco Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!
